name: rosetta
description: Operates the Rosetta.md documentation system: scaffolds a Starlight docs site from rosetta-template into rosetta-docs/, personalizes it with project metadata and an overview, writes Diátaxis-compliant pages, and queries live docs via /llms.txt. Includes scaffolded topic presets (doc-auth, doc-db, doc-migrations, doc-patterns) reserved for v0.4.0. Use for any documentation workflow in a Rosetta-powered project.
